quotes.quote: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
Allah does not burden a soul beyond what it can bear.
And whoever relies upon Allah, then He is sufficient for him.
So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.
And He found you lost and guided you.
For indeed, it is not eyes that are blinded, but hearts within the chests that become blind.
And do good; indeed, Allah loves the doers of good.
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
Allah is with those who are patient.
Whoever saves one life, it is as if they saved all of humanity.
Knowledge without action is madness, and action without knowledge is vanity.
The heart is like a mirror. Clean it from impurities so that it may reflect truth.
Do not let your difficulties make you despair; every difficulty has an end.
A person’s worth is measured by what they bring to others.
The best of people are those who are most beneficial to others.
Patience is a tree whose root is bitter, but its fruit is sweet.
The strongest person is not the one who defeats others, but the one who controls himself.
A wise person sees their own faults before looking for faults in others.
The unexamined life is not worth living.
It is not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
Happiness depends upon ourselves.
The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
No man ever steps in the same river twice.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.
Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day after day.
A calm mind brings inner strength and self-confidence.
The best way out is always through.
Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
The future depends on what you do today.
Character is what you do when no one is watching.
Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Turn your wounds into wisdom.
What you seek is seeking you.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Stay hungry, stay foolish.
Difficult roads often lead to beautiful destinations.
Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
A little progress each day adds up to big results.
Peace begins with a smile.
